title: EIA BA Interchange Hourly JSON API
description:
Balancing Authority (BA) Interchange Data in hourly intervals as reported in the EIA-930 dataset. This dataset contains both "to" and "from" for each BA.

⚠️ For the most accurate and up to date ISO/RTO interchange data, we recommend using their respective datasets instead.

 📝 This dataset was utilized in *[SPP Expansion Provides a Blueprint for the Future of the Grid](https://blog.gridstatus.io/spp-expansion-west/)*

ℹ️ We recheck historical data for 30 days after publication in case of updates. Updates are applied only when the new values are non-null.
